instruction: You are a professional translator, your task is to translate the given speech from English into Spanish.
input: And it's truly a great honor to have the opportunity to come to this stage twice; I'm extremely grateful. I have been blown away by this conference, and I want to thank all of you for the many nice comments about what I had to say the other night.<|end-of-read|>
output: Muchas gracias Chris. Y es en verdad un gran honor tener la oportunidad de venir a este escenario por segunda vez. Estoy extremadamente agradecido. He quedado conmovido por esta conferencia, y deseo agradecer a todos ustedes sus amables comentarios acerca de lo que tenía que decir la otra noche.<|end-of-write|>
